Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter

  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:

Modified: head/devel/p5-Iterator-Misc/Makefile

--- head/devel/p5-Iterator-Misc/Makefile	Sun May 25 12:40:06 2014	(r355207)
+++ head/devel/p5-Iterator-Misc/Makefile	Sun May 25 12:40:10 2014	(r355208)

 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org

 COMMENT=	Miscellaneous iterator functions
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Iterator>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Iterator
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
